heading: Chief of Legislative Liaison
label: 9023 Chief of Legislative Liaison

children.label: a
children.text: There is a Chief of Legislative Liaison in the Department of the Air Force.

children.label: b
children.text: The Chief of Legislative Liaison shall perform legislative affairs functions as specified for the Office of the Secretary of the Air Force by .section 9014(c)(1)(F) of this title
